events.name: cms.entry.created
events.description: Entry aggregate created in authoring state.
events.implementationStatus: Enqueue after cms_entry and initial version are committed in one transaction. - Implemented.

events.name: cms.entry.updated
events.description: Entry metadata, body, field values, media, or terms changed.
events.implementationStatus: Enqueue after versioned entry writes and include changed field summary. - Implemented.

events.name: cms.entry.published
events.description: Entry publish snapshot is visible through app/open delivery surfaces.
events.implementationStatus: Enqueue after cms_publish_snapshot and publish-state update commit together. - Implemented.

events.name: cms.entry.unpublished
events.description: Entry publish visibility has been removed.
events.implementationStatus: Enqueue after publish-state removal and invalidate delivery caches. - Implemented.

events.name: cms.entry.rolled_back
events.description: Entry content was restored from a previous version.
events.implementationStatus: Include source version id and restored version id in the event payload. - Implemented.

events.name: cms.page.published
events.description: Page blocks and route snapshot have been published.
events.implementationStatus: Enqueue after page snapshot rendering and route uniqueness validation. - Implemented.

events.name: cms.feed.published
events.description: Feed composition snapshot has been published for delivery.
events.implementationStatus: Enqueue after cms_feed_snapshot is created from curated/rule/hybrid feed inputs. - Implemented.

events.name: cms.search.sync_requested
events.description: Request search indexing or reindexing for a CMS aggregate.
events.implementationStatus: Translate committed CMS payloads into CmsSearchSyncPort requests without writing search tables. - Implemented.

events.name: cms.cache.invalidate_requested
events.description: Request invalidation of site, channel, entry, page, or feed delivery cache tags.
events.implementationStatus: Build stable cache tags from tenant, site, channel, locale, and aggregate ids. - Implemented.

events.name: cms.notification.requested
events.description: Request workflow notification delivery through Messaging.
events.implementationStatus: Map workflow subscribers and event templates through CmsNotificationPort. - Implemented.

events.name: cms.webhook.delivery_requested
events.description: Request external webhook delivery for CMS lifecycle events.
events.implementationStatus: Resolve webhook endpoints outside CMS tables and enqueue signed delivery payloads. - Implemented.

events.name: cms.sitemap.projection_requested
events.description: Request sitemap projection rebuild for published entries or pages.
events.implementationStatus: Use CmsSitemapProjectionPort with site id and publish snapshot metadata. - Implemented.

events.name: cms.rss.projection_requested
events.description: Request RSS projection rebuild for published feeds.
events.implementationStatus: Use CmsSitemapProjectionPort RSS method with feed id and snapshot id. - Implemented.

dependencyPorts.purpose: Resolve tenant, organization, principal, and permission checks.
dependencyPorts.implementationStatus: Call before repository access and never trust tenant ids from request bodies. - Implemented.

dependencyPorts.purpose: Validate Drive node/object references before attaching media to entries.
dependencyPorts.implementationStatus: Validate media ownership and persist only Drive/MediaResource references. - Implemented.

dependencyPorts.purpose: Request indexing for published or changed CMS aggregates.
dependencyPorts.implementationStatus: Convert outbox events into search sync requests through the Search SDK boundary. - Implemented.

dependencyPorts.purpose: Invalidate delivery caches after publish-state changes.
dependencyPorts.implementationStatus: Invalidate by cache tags, not by raw SQL table scans. - Implemented.

dependencyPorts.purpose: Validate preview tokens for draft delivery reads.
dependencyPorts.implementationStatus: Validate token scope against owner type, owner id, expiry, and tenant. - Implemented.
Persist schedule intent and call scheduler after transaction commit. - Implemented.
Resolve subscribers and templates through Messaging SDKs only. - Implemented.
Sign payloads and retry through webhook runtime, not CMS request handlers. - Implemented.

dependencyPorts.purpose: Compose comments, likes, favorites, and engagement summaries into delivery views.
dependencyPorts.implementationStatus: Fetch engagement summaries through dependency SDKs without copying engagement tables. - Implemented.

dependencyPorts.purpose: Request sitemap and RSS projection rebuilds.
dependencyPorts.implementationStatus: Rebuild projections asynchronously from published snapshots. - Implemented.
